title: elymus elongatus subsp. turcicus
intro: Elymus elongatus subsp. turcicus, also known as the Turkish wheat grass, is a subspecies of a perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of Turkey. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Elymus elongatus subsp. turcicus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and aid in weight loss. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a supplement to support overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
